name: MpiMpiBCBSMbrOutPHashFileCrt

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT MBR_OUTP.MPI_MBR_ID, POSSEC.PRCS_OWNER_SRC_SYS_ENVRN_ID, POSSEC.ENVRN_ID, MBR_OUTP.PRCS_RUN_DTM, MBR_OUTP.SSN, MBR_OUTP.BRTH_DT, MBR_OUTP.FIRST_NM, MBR_OUTP.MIDINIT, MBR_OUTP.LAST_NM, MBR_OUTP.NM_PFX, MBR_OUTP.NM_SFX, MBR_OUTP.MBR_GNDR_CD, MBR_OUTP.SUB_ID, MBR_OUTP.MBR_SFX_NO, MBR_OUTP.ADDR_LN_1, MBR_OUTP.ADDR_LN_2, MBR_OUTP.ADDR_LN_3, MBR_OUTP.CITY_NM, MBR_OUTP.ST_CD, MBR_OUTP.POSTAL_CD, MBR_OUTP.CTRY_CD, MBR_OUTP.MBR_HOME_PHN_NO, MBR_OUTP.MBR_MOBL_PHN_NO, MBR_OUTP.MBR_WORK_PHN_NO, MBR_OUTP.EMAIL_ADDR_TX_1, MBR_OUTP.EMAIL_ADDR_TX_2, MBR_OUTP.EMAIL_ADDR_TX_3, MBR_OUTP.MBR_RELSHP_CD, MBR_OUTP.GRP_ID, MBR_OUTP.GRP_NM, MBR_OUTP.PREV_INDV_BE_KEY, MBR_OUTP.MPI_SUB_ID, MBR_OUTP.GRP_EDI_VNDR_NM, MBR_OUTP.CLNT_ID, MBR_OUTP.MBR_DCSD_DT, MBR_OUTP.ASG_INDV_BE_KEY, MBR_OUTP.MPI_NTFCTN_IN, MBR_OUTP.SUB_INDV_BE_KEY FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_BCBSOwner}.MBR_OUTP AS MBR_OUTP JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_BCBSOwner}.PRCS_OWNER_SRC_SYS_ENVRN_CRSWALK AS POSSEC ON MBR_OUTP.PRCS_OWNER_SRC_SYS_ENVRN_CK = POSSEC.PRCS_OWNER_SRC_SYS_ENVRN_CK WHERE MBR_OUTP.MPI_MBR_ID = @{pipeline().parameters.MPI_MBR_ID} AND POSSEC.PRCS_OWNER_SRC_SYS_ENVRN_ID = @{pipeline().parameters.PRCS_OWNER_SRC_SYS_ENVRN_ID}

Description:
\(9)    hf_MpiMpiBCBSMbrOutPExtr creates the hash file that will be used in the MpiMpiBCBSMbrOutPExtr job for looping

Called by:
                    MpiMpiBCBSBekeyCntl

Processing:
                    Converts the MPI app notification file into the format of a MPI daily file

Control Job Rerun Information: 
                    Previous Run Successful:    What needs to happen before a special run can occur?
                    Previous Run Aborted:         Restart, no other steps necessary
